arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Sparta Prague – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City host Sparta Prague on Wednesday night as both teams look to extend their unbeaten starts in the Champions League. It will be the first time the two sides have met and the contest should be an intriguing one after strong starts for each in Europe. arts.ttl: Jhon Duran: Arsenal target Aston Villa striker BETTER than Erling Haaland

arts.ttl: Man City vs Sparta Prague: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: After being held to a stalemate by Inter in a repeat of the 2023 final on Matchday 1, City cruised to all three points away at rookies Slovan Bratislava last time out with six games remaining. Manchester City take on Czech champions Sparta Prague on Matchday 3 of the Champions League league phase on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Man City predicted lineup vs Sparta Prague
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola's Cityzens were just about victorious at Wolves on Sunday thanks to John Stones' last-gasp winner and Wednesday's game does present the boss with a handy opportunity to rest and rotate after their weekend's travails. These two sides surprisingly enter the contest each with four points in the league phase table and Sparta will aim to offer City more of a game than Slovan Bratislava did before the October international break .
